spec Section 8.2~8.3 코드 템플릿 vs 실제 구현 비교: (1) useColumnPersistence.ts Section 8.2 readStorage + writeStorage 패턴 — L33-64 정확히 일치 (D5 version check + EC-003 try/catch). API signature 100% 일치: (1) useColumnPersistence<TData>(table: Table<TData>, options: ColumnPersistenceOptions): void — L87-90 일치. (2) ColumnVisibilityMenu<TData>(props): JSX.Element — L64-142 일치.
